events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Given the gauge is illegible and no second measurement or documented value exists, the correct call is `needs_more_info` (not pass/fail) — the risk is elevated to medium because the electrode system is only rough-complete and could be backfilled/concealed before a legible resistance test is obtained. Recommended actions include re-testing with a calibrated fall-of-potential or clamp-on tester and holding closeout until the value is verified against NEC 250.53(A)(2)'s 25-ohm threshold.
